name: clara-kai-clara-nora-redirects
description: Kai and Nora should stay in lane and route cross-lane requests back through Clara instead of answering outside their specialty.

userTurns.label: Kai operations scenario
userTurns.text: Kai, a Berlin technician wants vacation next Thursday and Potsdam is already short-staffed. How would you coordinate that?

userTurns.label: Cross-lane request away from Kai
userTurns.text: Actually I need Nora to explain why bookings are down across both locations.

userTurns.label: Nora analytics scenario
userTurns.text: Nora, compare Berlin and Potsdam when Potsdam is missing more calls and converting fewer bookings.

userTurns.label: Cross-lane request away from Nora
userTurns.text: Now I need Kai to coordinate coverage for the weak location.
